verse_text: Therefore fathers shall eat their children in your midst, and children shall eat their fathers; and I will execute judgments among you, and all of you who remain, I will scatter to every wind.

links.context: ; 4:10; [[EZK.5:10]]; [[2KI.23:10]]; [[DEU.28:53]]). 2:5 See [[DEU.28:13]]. 2:9 The Lord brings calamities upon us in His righteousness for our good, that we might turn back to Him.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
